notes: Top-level writes uncommitted FREEZE receipt first (Phase A), solicits approval, then expands argv_template per argv_expansion (read CLAUDE_JOB_DIR from environment — not argv; require absolute existing job dir; resolve <job>/tmp; replace only documented tokens; reject leftover {…}/$…; require artifact/result parents absolute descendants of job_tmp), then invokes that exact validated expanded argv once with shell=False. 'Exactly once' means the expanded argv list, not the raw template. Launcher may also re-validate job-tmp boundary. Allocates IDs just-in-time, builder then runner once, asserts counts/AUTH/terminal, never commits. MCP URL via env only — never argv secret. No GSD continuation. No shell expansion of $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR.
